title: All Because of a Cup of Coffee
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: When a spilled cup of coffee makes Geronimo fall for a countess, a wild family trip to find a legendary cheese valley teaches him what really matters! ☕

q.en: Where was Geronimo eating breakfast when a mouse spilled coffee on him?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩正在哪里吃早餐时，被一只老鼠把咖啡洒在了身上？

explain.en: Geronimo says he was having breakfast at the Tail Trap Diner, famous for its hot cheese buns, when coffee was spilled on his jacket.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩说，他当时正在以热奶酪面包闻名的尾巴陷阱餐厅吃早餐，咖啡被洒在了他的外套上。

q.en: What is the name of the beautiful countess who spilled the coffee?
q.zh: 把咖啡洒出来的那位美丽女伯爵叫什么名字？

explain.en: The newspaper caption names her as the young countess Stephanie von Sugarfur, daughter of Count Chester Cheesenip.
explain.zh: 报纸上的说明文字写明她是年轻的斯蒂芬妮·冯·糖毛郡主，切斯特·奶酪鼻伯爵的女儿。

q.zh: 杰罗尼摩经营的是哪份报纸？

explain.en: Geronimo tells readers, 'I run a daily newspaper. It's called The Rodent's Gazette.'
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩告诉读者：“我经营一份日报，名叫《啮齿动物公报》。”

q.en: How many red roses did Geronimo send to the countess?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩给女伯爵送了多少朵红玫瑰？

explain.en: He settled on 'five dozen long-stemmed red roses' for the countess at the florist.
explain.zh: 他在花店为女伯爵选定了“五打长茎红玫瑰”。

q.en: Who is Geronimo's loud cousin who ate half the chocolates and said 'play it cool'?
q.zh: 谁是杰罗尼摩那位大嗓门的表哥，他吃掉了半盒巧克力，还说要“保持冷静”？

explain.en: Cousin Trap scarfed down half the box of Cheesy Chews and advised Geronimo to 'play it cool' with lady mice.
explain.zh: 表哥特拉普抢吃了半盒奶酪软糖，还劝杰罗尼摩对女老鼠要“保持冷静”。

q.en: Who is Geronimo's nine-year-old nephew who found the Valley of the Cheesettes?
q.zh: 谁是杰罗尼摩九岁的侄子，他找到了奶酪小妞谷？

explain.en: Benjamin, Geronimo's favorite nephew who is 'only nine years old', squeezed through the tiny hole and saw the valley.
explain.zh: 本杰明是杰罗尼摩最疼爱的侄子，书中说他“只有九岁”，他钻过那个小洞看见了山谷。

q.en: What legendary place did the family search for, called the Eighth Wonder of the World?
q.zh: 这一家人寻找的那处被称为世界第八大奇迹的传奇之地叫什么？

explain.en: The magazine article says the Valley of the Cheesettes is said to be the Eighth Wonder of the World, on Butterfly Island.
explain.zh: 杂志上的文章说，位于蝴蝶岛上的奶酪小妞谷被称为世界第八大奇迹。

q.en: How did the family travel to Butterfly Island?
q.zh: 这家人是坐什么交通工具去蝴蝶岛的？

options.en: By a jeep and a speedboat

explain.en: They rode the 'Risky Rodent Travels' jeep to the harbor and then a thin speedboat to Butterfly Island.
explain.zh: 他们先坐着“冒险鼠旅行社”的吉普车到港口，再换乘细长的快艇前往蝴蝶岛。

q.en: What tiny creature did Benjamin hide under his red hat to prove they found the valley?
q.zh: 本杰明把什么小生物藏在自己的红帽子下面，以此证明他们找到了山谷？

options.zh: 一只名叫奶酪小妞的黄色蝴蝶

explain.en: A small yellow butterfly flew out of Benjamin's red hat; he named her Cheesette and she proved their discovery.
explain.zh: 一只黄色小蝴蝶从本杰明的红帽子里飞了出来，他叫她奶酪小妞，正是她证明了他们的发现。

q.en: What did the fortune-teller 'Madame Love Doctor' charge Geronimo for her advice?
q.zh: 算命的“爱情医生夫人”为她的指点向杰罗尼摩收了多少钱？

explain.en: As Geronimo left, Madame Love Doctor held out her paw and said, 'that will be two hundred dollars.'
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩离开时，爱情医生夫人伸出爪子说：“这就两百美元。”
